name: Apple's Enterprise IT Battle Plan, Part Two
description: MacNewsWorld second installment on Apple's enterprise strategy. Peter Kastner of Aberdeen Group sees Apple 'turning up the heat' by targeting specialized verticals (wireless, online business) rather than head-on assaults on Fortune 500 IT shops. Kastner argues that large-enterprise IS staffs gravitate away from Apple because they are trained to wrangle complex multi-vendor stacks, making small and medium-sized businesses the more natural beachhead for Apple enterprise penetration.

creator.name: Elizabeth Millard (reporter, MacNewsWorld); Peter Kastner (quoted source)
